data.body: In terminal-manager.ts: (1) Add nextBeatGuarded() and advanceGuarded() dispatcher alongside existing nextKnotGuarded(). (2) Replace 4 nextKnotGuarded() call sites with advanceGuarded(). (3) Remove knots-only take loop guard at line 735. (4) Parameterize QUEUE_TERMINAL_INVARIANT_INSTRUCTION by memoryManagerType. (5) Extend pre-take healing to beads at lines 559-575.
data.title: Phase 6: Terminal manager dispatch and take loop gate removal
